title: 2025 Fig Clothing Reliance Trends: Market Analysis and Growth Insights
text: FIGS medical scrubs maintain strong sustained demand with fig scrubs showing significantly higher search interest than general fig clothing, particularly peaking December 2024 and January 2025. FIGS maintains leadership through continuous product innovation, elevated quality, and strong customer engagement while expanding into physical retail and B2B channels through TEAMS program. Products in popular categories have average ratings above 4.28 indicating strong customer satisfaction with consumers valuing quality and comfort. Consumer interest increasingly focuses on eco-friendly and durable attributes, aligning with rising interest in sustainable products crucial for appealing to environmentally conscious consumers.
